name: HWM IoT Non-magnetic Water Meter
desc: Non-magnetic impeller IoT water meter — interference-resistant, remote data transmission.
overview: The HWM Non-magnetic IoT Water Meter uses a proprietary non-contact electronic sensing element that eliminates reliance on magnetic sensing. This makes it completely immune to strong-magnet tampering attacks — one of the most common forms of meter fraud. Liquid crystal display shows reading, battery status and signal strength. Bi-directional NB-IoT / 4G communication.

specs.label: Sensing method
specs.value: Non-contact electronic sensor (no reed switch); direct impulse reading

features: Non-contact electronic sensing immune to magnetic tampering — most secure against common water meter fraud
Self-developed non-contact sensor directly reads pulse signal from impeller rotation for high accuracy
Young-sampling anti-interference technology filters pipeline vibration and hydraulic hammering in real time
Ultra-low power with high-density Li-SOCl₂ battery; battery life up to 6+ years
IP68 rated; fully epoxy-encapsulated; withstands extended flooding of meter pit
Two-way NB-IoT / 4G for remote parameter updates and valve control
LCD display: water usage, battery level, signal strength — visible in any lighting
